sessions.intent: Rebuild the event subsystem: singular `Event` naming inside the events area, drop EventType enum + Lifecycle/Bindings folder chain, universal Data.Value firing for variable events, On enum across categories, two-tier scope (app+context), scope:goal|app on event.on.

before.assumptions: Today: EventType enum with 11+ values, EventBinding with 5 match fields, deep folder chain App.Events.Lifecycle.Bindings.Binding.@this, three-tier registry walk (channel/actor/app), per-class lifecycle calls via lifecycle.Before.Run(EventType.BeforeStep). All discussed with Ingi 2026-05-12, design settled.
before.risk: Big change touching engine fire sites, Data.cs, the registry shape, the source generator (catalog for builder type validation), and the PLang event.on action. Cross-cutting; needs careful staging.

actions.context: Spine plan — design narrative, key decisions, stage index, invariants, risks, test outline, success criteria.

Topic deep-dives. data-value-firing covers where Name/Path get set and sync-vs-async. registry-internals covers storage shape, indexing, fast-path mask, two-tier walk. on-enum-semantics defines per-On contract for name/path fields.

Five stages. 1=new registry (parallel, isolated). 2=event.on writes to new shape with scope param. 3=engine fire sites migrate. 4=Data.Value fires variable events. 5=cleanup deletes old shapes. Each independently buildable + testable.
Branch entry point — design summary, stage index, carry-forward notes (parked branches, deferred Threads, broader rename). Written for someone unfamiliar to pick up next session.

after.status: Plan complete. Five-stage redesign laid out. Coder can start at Stage 1 (net-new code in PLang/App/Event/) — Stage 1 has no coupling to old code.
after.health: Design settled with Ingi through extensive whiteboard conversation. Two coder-side decisions flagged (sync-vs-async for Data.Value, whether to ship the catalog mechanism in Stage 2 or defer) — clearly documented in stage files.
after.notes: Branch is sized for ~5 stages. Thread 3 (BeforeAppStart firing + Events.goal loading) is explicitly out of scope — becomes a small follow-up after this lands. Broader codebase rename (Goals/Steps/Actions/Channels → singular) also out of scope, parked in todos.md.
